title: Dutch Pack
description: Its A Food Mod Where You Can Make The Dutch Food
body:
This is a mod that adds multiple things from the dutch culture and we want to make even more dutch things.

This Mod Is For 1.20.1 Forge We Want to make it to multiple versions and loaders.

This is just the start to something Big.

-------------Already in the mod-------------


Currently we have multiple things to show you Like the Pan where you can make Pancakes and in the future more.

We also have a Wafel ijzer where you can make Wafels.

We also have ingredients like Stroop in a Bowl and Wafel Deeg and Pancake Mix and even more.

The mod will add many new food items which are either similar food value as the base game and some even better.
This will give the player more choices in what they eat and what they can make with crops enhancing the overall experience.
